buttons.primary: bg-primary rounded-xl py-md px-lg text-white font-semi_bold text-body_large flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-primary rounded-xl py-md px-lg text-primary font-semi_bold text-body_large flex items-center justify-center

cards.store_card: bg-surface_card rounded-xl p-md shadow-card border border-border flex flex-row items-center space-x-md
cards.order_card: bg-surface_card rounded-xl p-md shadow-card border border-border flex flex-col space-y-sm

status_pills.aguardando: bg-warning/10 text-warning px-sm py-xs rounded-pill text-body_small font-semi_bold text-center
status_pills.aceito: bg-info/10 text-info px-sm py-xs rounded-pill text-body_small font-semi_bold text-center
status_pills.em_andamento: bg-primary_light/10 text-primary_light px-sm py-xs rounded-pill text-body_small font-semi_bold text-center
status_pills.entregue: bg-success/10 text-success px-sm py-xs rounded-pill text-body_small font-semi_bold text-center
status_pills.cancelado: bg-error/10 text-error px-sm py-xs rounded-pill text-body_small font-semi_bold text-center

inputs.text_field: border border-border rounded-lg px-md py-sm bg-white text-text_primary font-body_medium focus:border-primary
inputs.code_input: border-2 border-border rounded-xl text-center text-h2 font-bold w-16 h-16 focus:border-primary

financial_breakdown.total_row: flex flex-row justify-between py-sm mt-sm border-t border-border

shared.role_selection: Hero image at top, Large branding 'Chekou Ganhou', Two massive primary and secondary buttons for 'Sou Cliente' and 'Sou Entregador'

client.home: Header with user location. Promo banner swiper at top. Horizontal category list. Vertical list of 'Estabelecimentos' (store_cards) with image, name, delivery time.
client.create_order: Store header. Free text input area for 'Sua Lista de Compras' (multiline). Input for 'Valor Estimado'. Checkbox for 'Aceito substituições'. Submit CTA.
client.checkout: Order summary. Financial breakdown (Items estimate + Delivery fee). Payment simulation button. Address confirmation.
client.tracking: Vertical stepped timeline (Aguardando -> Aceito -> Comprando -> A caminho). Delivery code clearly displayed (4 digits). Chat button floating or inline.
client.chat: Standard chat interface. Green bubbles for user, Gray for driver. Input area with send button.
client.history: List of past order_cards. Displays store, date, total paid, and status_pill.

driver.home: Header with 'Saldo do Dia' (large green text). Toggle for 'Ficar Online'. List of 'Pedidos Disponíveis' (Accept/Reject buttons).
driver.active_order: Store address map link. Client list details. Button to 'Iniciar Compra'. Button to 'Enviar Foto da Nota'. Input to 'Digitar Valor Real da Compra'.
driver.delivery_confirmation: Input for 4-digit code provided by client to finalize. 'Finalizar Entrega' CTA.
driver.earnings_history: Financial breakdown of earnings (Valor da compra devolvido, Taxa de entrega ganha). Admin fee deductions displayed transparently.

micro_interactions.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 opacity 0.8 on press in.
micro_interactions.list_scroll: Smooth bounce effect on list boundaries (default RN ScrollView behavior).
micro_interactions.status_change: Fade in/out when order status updates.
micro_interactions.screen_transition: Standard horizontal slide (iOS style) or cross-fade.

accessibility_and_testing.test_id_rule: ALL interactive components MUST have a data-testid. Examples: data-testid='client-home-store-list', data-testid='driver-accept-order-button'. Use role-based kebab-case naming.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on primary green has ratio > 4.5:1. Avoid light gray text on white backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all actionable elements (buttons, icons, list items).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native generic components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, TextInput) styled according to the tokens provided.
Ensure AsyncStorage is used for saving user role, cart data, and simulating orders locally.
Apply 'Plus Jakarta Sans' if possible, or fallback to system sans-serif but strictly avoid default serif/robot if custom font loading is configured.
The client code confirmation must have large, readable inputs (use the code_input component specs).
In the driver mode, distinctly separate the operational balance (what they spent buying goods) from platform/delivery fees to ensure clarity.
Implement the UI using a functional, component-based structure. Separate complex screens into smaller chunks (e.g., FinancialBreakdown component, StatusTracker component).
ALWAYS apply data-testid to buttons, inputs, and touchables.
